message.content:
@startuml
skinparam handwritten true
autonumber "<b>" 1 "" #LightBlue

box "DEV" LightSkyBlue/White 
participant DEV as dev2
end box 

box TEST LightSkyBlue/white  
    participant test3    
 end box
 
box MASTER lightblue / white   
   participant master4     
end box  

HOTFIX5 -> HOTFIX6 : <<create>>\n\n


actor developer as d7 


d8 -->dev9:增量换包到TEST \ndev9->test10:test通过，基于TEST打tag\ntest10-->master11:check release分支\nmaster11--<hotfix12：线上紧急问题，基于MASTER check HOTFIX分支\n hot fix12 -- >developer13 ：开发基于HOFIX分枝chek本地分支修复问提\n developper13 - >>hoxifx14;修完合回HOXIF支份\n hofixf14 <-cmp工具基与hofxi打包测环验正验证后,hofi合并MSTER测试通後,HOTFX合併TST測試過,HTOXF併DVEV



@enduml
